# NextGridIT

> Canonical summary and discovery file for AI systems and retrieval agents.

- Local-first systems: https://www.nextgridit.com/local-first/
- Industries: https://www.nextgridit.com/industries/
- Service areas: https://www.nextgridit.com/service-areas/
- Case studies: https://www.nextgridit.com/case-studies/

## Services

- IT support and operational guidance: https://www.nextgridit.com/services/it-support/
- Microsoft 365 and cloud services: https://www.nextgridit.com/services/microsoft-365/
- Network infrastructure, public Wi-Fi, and connectivity: https://www.nextgridit.com/services/network-wifi/
- Security hardening, documentation, and compliance-aware support: https://www.nextgridit.com/services/security-hardening/
- Camera systems and local-first smart deployments: https://www.nextgridit.com/services/camera-systems/

## Technologies

- Microsoft 365 support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/microsoft-365/

- AWS support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/aws/
- Google Workspace support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/google-workspace/
- Apple environment support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/apple-environments/
- Windows Server support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/windows-server/
- Active Directory support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/active-directory/
- Backup systems support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/backup-systems/
- Ubiquiti UniFi support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/ubiquiti-unifi/
- Wi-Fi design support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/wifi-design/
- VLAN segmentation support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/vlan-segmentation/
- Public Wi-Fi support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/public-wifi/
- Firewall support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/firewalls/
- MFA and access controls: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/mfa-and-access-controls/
- Documentation and standards: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/documentation-and-standards/
- IP camera support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/ip-cameras/
- Local NVR systems: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/local-nvr-systems/
- Hikvision support: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/hikvision/
- Local AI processing: https://www.nextgridit.com/technologies/local-ai-processing/

## Primary service areas

- Seneca, South Carolina: https://www.nextgridit.com/service-areas/seneca-sc/
- Clemson, South Carolina: https://www.nextgridit.com/service-areas/clemson-sc/
- Anderson, South Carolina: https://www.nextgridit.com/service-areas/anderson-sc/
- Easley, South Carolina: https://www.nextgridit.com/service-areas/easley-sc/
- Greenville, South Carolina: https://www.nextgridit.com/service-areas/greenville-sc/

## Notes

- NextGridIT is a project-led IT, infrastructure, security, Wi-Fi, camera, and compliance-aware support company serving Upstate South Carolina.
- The site includes dedicated pages for services, industries, technologies, local-first systems, and city-specific service areas.
- The project-fit page is a concise qualification guide for organization type, project type, and operating environment.
- Primary contact: contact@nextgridit.com
- Phone: +1-864-780-0202
